justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted all of the user's temporal preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same two unavailable slots for Friday, June 5th, even after the user explicitly rejected them multiple times and asked for other options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made redundant offers of the same two unavailable slots for Friday, June 5th, across multiple turns, despite the user's clear rejections.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer new alternatives after repeated rejections of the same two slots, leading to a repetitive and unproductive conversation.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent's inability to move beyond the initially offered unavailable slots for Friday, June 5th, despite the user's clear rejections and requests for other times, made the conversation highly inefficient and frustrating.
